CustomField.description: Indicates whether the underlying model supports multimodal (vision) input, enabling image and binary file content to be sent as base64-encoded content arrays rather than plain text.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enable for vision-capable models (e.g. GPT-4o, Claude 3 Sonnet, Gemini Pro Vision). When checked, ActionAnalyzeFile returns image and PDF content as base64 for the LLM to interpret directly.
CustomField.label: Supports Vision
